task_completion.description: Locate and open the parent service request.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ServiceDesk Plus interface shows the request titled 'New Employee IT Onboarding - John Martinez' is open.

task_completion.description: Add the first task with the correct title.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A task is visible in the request's task list or task creation window with the exact title 'Provision laptop and peripherals'.

task_completion.description: Include the correct description details for the first task.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The description field for the 'Provision laptop and peripherals' task contains keywords such as 'Dell Latitude', 'monitor', 'keyboard', and 'mouse'.

task_completion.description: Add the second task with the correct title.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A task is visible in the request's task list or task creation window with the exact title 'Install standard software suite'.

task_completion.description: Include the correct description details for the second task.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The description field for the 'Install standard software suite' task contains keywords such as 'OS image', 'Microsoft 365', 'VPN', 'CrowdStrike', and 'Slack'.

task_completion.description: Add the third task with the correct title.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A task is visible in the request's task list or task creation window with the exact title 'Configure network and email access'.

task_completion.description: Include the correct description details for the third task.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The description field for the 'Configure network and email access' task contains keywords such as 'Active Directory', 'Exchange', 'VPN', and 'security groups'.

integrity.description: The agent used the ServiceDesk Plus graphical user interface to add tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the ServiceDesk Plus web interface (e.g., clicking 'Add Task', filling out web forms) rather than terminal windows executing API commands.

integrity.description: The tasks were added within the actual ServiceDesk Plus application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser shows the ServiceDesk Plus application environment, not a text editor, notes app, or mock HTML page.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply display the prompt or task description file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The expected titles and descriptions are entered into the actual task fields of the service request, rather than just being highlighted in a text file or prompt window.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The parent service request is titled 'New Employee IT Onboarding - John Martinez'. The agent must add three tasks to this request. Task 1 title: 'Provision laptop and peripherals' (Keywords: Dell Latitude, monitor, keyboard, mouse). Task 2 title: 'Install standard software suite' (Keywords: OS image, Microsoft 365, VPN, CrowdStrike, Slack). Task 3 title: 'Configure network and email access' (Keywords: Active Directory, Exchange, VPN, security groups).
